name: aerocool-unlighthouse-audit
description: Unlighthouse audit configuration for Aerocool Hugo site

scripts.audit:ci: unlighthouse-ci --config-file unlighthouse.production.config.ts --reporter jsonExpanded --build-static true && npm run check:reports -- reports/production
scripts.audit:ci:strict: unlighthouse-ci --config-file unlighthouse.strict.config.ts --reporter jsonExpanded --build-static true && npm run check:reports -- reports/strict
scripts.audit:ci:preview: unlighthouse-ci --config-file unlighthouse.preview.config.ts --reporter jsonExpanded --build-static true && npm run check:reports -- reports/preview
scripts.audit:ci:technical: unlighthouse-ci --config-file unlighthouse.technical.config.ts --reporter jsonExpanded --build-static true && npm run check:reports -- reports/technical-noindex
scripts.audit:ci:urls: unlighthouse-ci --config-file unlighthouse.urls.config.ts --reporter jsonExpanded --build-static true && npm run check:reports -- reports/critical-urls
